title: Undertale 2 Effect Sprites (*AND SPELL ICONS!)
description:
replace all your status effect icons with vaguely undertale related icons!
(now with iron's spells & spellbooks spell icons!)
body:
Ever gotten tired of how Minecraft status effect icons look? No? Too bad.

This resource pack replaces THOUSANDS of effect icons with sprites from hit 2021 sequel UNDERTALE 2 - REVENGE OF THE ROBOTS!
(also featuring sprites from undertale yellow 2, an in-developement fan sequel to the fangame undertale yellow!)

# ALSO HAS FULL SUPPORT FOR IRON'S SPELLS & SPELLBOOK SPELL ICONS! (+ SOME ADDONS!) #

## PLAY UNDERTALE 2! ## 

[UNDERTALE 2 - REVENGE OF THE ROBOTS](https://pep.itch.io/undertale-2)

## ALSO PLAY UNDERTALE YELLOW 2'S DEMO! ## 

[UNDERTALE YELLOW 2](https://darkworldralsei.itch.io/undertale-yellow-2)

## ALSO ALSO PLAY SORRYPONIKO'S OTHER GAME, GIMMIKO!!! (COMING SOON!!!) ##

[GIMMIKO](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2101420/GIMMIKO/)

## USE MOREMCMETA, OPTIGUI OR ANIMATICA TO EXPERIENCE THE FULL CAPABILITIES OF THIS PACK! (NOT REQUIRED, BUT RECOMMENDED!) ##

[MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)

[Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)

[OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)

## SUPPORTS OVER 180 MODS! ##

## WANT MORE MODS? IS ONE OF THESE OUTDATED? ASK ME! ##

It shouldn't be too hard to track me down, my username is the same everywhere lol

## HAQ! (HYPOTHETICALLY ASKED QUESTIONS) ##

  Q: *These sprites aren't accurate to **X**'s source material!* 

  A: Some of these mods are based off of properties i've yet to watch/read/play, so apologies if some of the effects are innacurate (primarily with Jujutsu Craft.)

  Q: *Some of these sprites aren't accurate to the effects they represent!*

  A: I don't really have the time or motivation to play through each individual mod listed here, so some of these (albeit few) are moreso based off of descriptions found on wikis, or their names.

  Q: *Do I have to install ALL of the mods in order to use this resource pack?*

  A: Not at all! Heck, this pack will work even if you have no mods! (DISCLAIMER: I DO NOT RECCOMEND USING ALL OF THESE MODS AT ONCE! IT WILL (MOST LIKELY) BREAK YOUR GAME, OR AT THE VERY LEAST LAG A LOT!!)

  Q: *Some sprites look all squished & weird!*

  A: Some of the effects have animated sprites, which requires you to install a mod that allows you to animate UI elements (Optifine, OptiGUI, MoreMcmeta, Animatica, ect.) Unfortunately, this means if you don't install one of these mods, those sprites are just stuck like that.

  Q: *Okay, but what if i'm playing multiplayer? I don't wanna install a mod that changes the game just to enjoy goofy pictures.*

  A: Optifine, Optigui, Moremcmeta and Animatica are all client side, so it shouldn't really affect your experience.

  Q: *Is this for Fabric or Forge?*

  A: Both. It should work for Quilt, NeoForge and Vanilla as well.
  
  Q: *Does this work in older versions than 1.20.1?*
  
  A: Probably. I didn't go through every single mod and check it in every different minecraft version. At least 3 of the supported mods aren't avaliable for modern minecraft versions, but that doesn't really cause any problems.

  Q: *Does this work in the latest updates?*

  A: It seems so, even though I swear I heard somewhere that they were changing where effect sprites were stored in one of the new updates. Unfortunately, the latest Minecraft versions lack most major content mods, but the pack should still work regardless.

  Q: *Can I use some of these for something I'm creating?*

  A: I don't really have the authority to allow things like that. You'd probably have to ask Zizou or Raltzy, depending on which game the sprite is from. I've drawn a few of these myself, but a majority is edited/taken directly from Undertale 2 and Undertale Yellow 2.

  Q: *Will this take up a lot of space?*

  A: No, unless you have a computer from the 90's. The pack is only about 1 mb.

  Q: *Why is **X** included here???*

  A: A couple of these mods are just some of the most downloaded mods on curseforge and modrinth. Most of them are ones I regularly use in modpacks or just generally like. I'm completely out of the loop when it comes to mod developement drama, so if I unintentionally include a mod made by a bad person, I apologize.

  Q: *Is the **Y** fork/port of **X** mod supported, even though it isn't listed?*

  A: Usually, unless the fork or port uses a different namespace.
  
  Q: *Why did you spend so much time and effort on something so ridiculous and inconsequential?*

  A: I have no clue.
  
## F-F-FUN FACTS! ##
This resource pack (as of v10) has just over 2000 files in it (including duplicates)!
I've officially been working on this pack for almost a whole year now!

This resource pack includes references to way more things than just Undertale 2! (Deltarune, Undertale, Undertale Yellow, etc.)

All of the effect sprites & spell (aside from effects pertaining to a cooldown) are 24x24 pixels in resolution.

There may or may not be some ~~g~~easter eggs in here...

There's more than 20 seperate (and functionally identical) 'bleeding' effects in this list of mods! Cool...?
